# Agency Chief of Staff for Codex

> An outcome-owned OpenAI Codex Desktop and Codex CLI Skill for moving complex work through research, planning, execution, dynamic role and model routing, verification, independent cold review, and concise delivery.

Canonical Skill: `agency-chief-of-staff`. The legacy `zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf` slug is only an explicit compatibility entry. The core runtime uses OpenAI/Codex; Claude and Fable are optional advisor extension points that are disabled by default and are not dependencies. Common discovery terms include Codex agency, Codex multi-agent orchestration, Codex subagent routing, Codex model routing, Codex Skill, Codex 幕僚长, and Codex 多 Agent 编排.

This is a curated inference-time documentation index following the emerging `llms.txt` proposal. It does not grant crawler permission, change the MIT license, prove model or host behavior, or imply that later checkout or `Unreleased` changes are published. Use the README version table, changelog, and GitHub Releases page together when answering release-status questions.

## Start Here

- [Project overview and installation](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/README.md): Canonical entry, current checkout boundary, installation, routing, visualization, and validation levels.
- [Canonical Skill instructions](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/SKILL.md): Runtime orchestration contract and user-facing behavior.
- [Documentation index](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/docs/README.md): Current runtime guidance and historical-record boundaries.
- [Real-world prompts](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/examples/real-world-prompts.md): Invocation examples for delivery, Goal, review, and real task/thread workflows.

## Runtime Contracts

- [Model routing and budget](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/references/model-routing-and-budget.md): Capability classes, current-host catalog readback, Codex-only routing, and evidence states.
- [Real Codex tasks and threads](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/references/real-threads.md): When real tasks, isolated worktrees, receipts, and cleanup are required.
- [User experience and visualization](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/references/user-experience.md): Chat-first interaction, data-gated visual surfaces, mount/readback, and fallback behavior.
- [Delivery and independent review](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/references/delivery-review.md): Verification, cold review, repair, and release-readiness boundaries.

## Verification and Releases

- [Changelog](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): `Unreleased` development changes and tagged-version history.
- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/releases): Authoritative public release and tag surface.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Required checks and evidence boundaries for changes.
- [Security policy](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Supported versions and private vulnerability reporting.

- [Repository discovery metadata](https://github.com/papperrollinggery/zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf/blob/main/docs/REPOSITORY_DISCOVERY.md): Proposed GitHub description/topics and SEO/GEO maintenance rules; values are not applied without an authorized external write.
